name: Old Dominion Freight Line
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at $223.1678. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $223.1678, stop $201.3978, target $226.7925. Risk/reward is 0.17:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
